blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this learning path!


You've accomplished the following:

- Explained how soak testing extends average-load testing with a longer plateau
- Built a soak profile with k6 `stages`, cloud streaming, and degradation thresholds
- Ran a 30-minute learning soak and read trends in Grafana Cloud k6
- Correlated k6 metrics with infrastructure signals when degradation appeared
- Documented onset time, drift rate, and degradation category
- Mapped results to investigations and a soak retest cadence
